author: @ebenburger111
text: Hi Robert, I'm quite concerned. There's speculations that graphene oxide might be in many of the masks being used for covid. Also, there's a very strong possibility that graphene oxide might be in most if not all of the covid vaccines..... According to my research this substance has many potential benefits as well as being highly effective against viruses, Bacteria etc however there are clinical evidence that shows its hazardous effects on the immune system of animal etc.... My question to you and to myself, is what can we do to naturally detoxify our bodies of this substance? We're currently being's forced to take it against our will. Apparently it does break down over time, however in extremely high dose, who knows the extent of the damage that it'll cause within days, weeks or months. Graphene Oxide is apparently also more reactive when exposed to strong or certain Wi-Fi frequencies.....

text: Hello, Rob.Last time you did a video about graphene enhanced concrete and I was wondering, since graphene oxide is dispersable in water adn it already comes in liquid forms it can be added to a concrete/mortar mixture and it will give the enhanced properties to the concrete, although not the properties of the pure graphene. What are your thought about this. Thanks Rob.

replies.text: it's a great idea mate - give it a go - pun not intended lol

replies.author: @beholderer

Ok Rob but the only thing that still concernss me is the dosage, and since GO is really expensieve, I want to use it as efficient as possible. I am currently buying my GO from amazon. author: @nemaproducts
text: https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2016/09/160927225306.htm  .. take a gander !!!  especially the part about ''repairs'' .. wonder if it crumples?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I don't understand this was being done 5 years ago?

replies.author: @nemaproducts
replies.text:
sorry ..might have explain a bit more but with regards to this vid   .... if im reading correct ... 'firstly 'oxygen distorts the pristine atomic structure of graphene and degrades its properties ''... '' removing oxygen from graphene oxide to obtain high-quality graphene has been a significant challenge ...''....no need for a reduction process from graphene oxide to graphene !! Just microwave it !!?? ..., "This not only efficiently eliminates oxygen functional groups from graphene oxides,..it is also capable of rearranging defective graphene films." .... so oxidise away and still end up with good quality graphene !!

the other paper i showed below .... refers to  ... no need for hummers method  ...dry mix your permanganate and nitric acid ...microwave it !! and bobs your uncle !! expanded grahite !! '' Intercalation agent molecules
(HNO3) migrate and deposit between the graphene layers of
graphite in the intercalation process, and then the intercalation
agent molecules are vaporized under microwave irradiation... '' so need to heat it , stir it, wash it etc .... 

At the end of the day ... just saving time ..increasing yield and quality ... food for thought for those watching this vid .

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: awesome post mate - that made everything much clearer - cheers
